rpcs.name: RecordEvent
rpcs.description: RecordEvent records an immutable audit event.

rpcs.name: QueryEvents
rpcs.description: QueryEvents returns audit events matching filters.

rpcs.name: GetTimeline
rpcs.description: GetTimeline returns a chronological timeline for an entity.

rpcs.name: GetEvent
rpcs.description: GetEvent returns a single audit event by ID.

rpcs.name: CountEvents
rpcs.description: CountEvents counts audit events for a tenant with optional filters.

rpcs.name: IngestDocument
rpcs.description: IngestDocument ingests a spine document with optional chunks.

rpcs.name: GetDocument
rpcs.description: GetDocument returns a spine document by ID.

rpcs.name: ListDocuments
rpcs.description: ListDocuments lists spine documents for a tenant.

rpcs.name: SearchDocuments
rpcs.description: SearchDocuments searches spine documents by content.

rpcs.name: GetDocumentStats
rpcs.description: GetDocumentStats returns document statistics for a tenant.

rpcs.name: RecordArtifact
rpcs.description: RecordArtifact records a spine artifact linked to a resource.

rpcs.name: Publish
rpcs.description: Publish sends an event to a subject.

rpcs.name: Subscribe
rpcs.description: Subscribe creates a durable subscription to a subject pattern.

rpcs.name: GetDeadLetters
rpcs.description: GetDeadLetters returns failed messages for retry or inspection.

rpcs.name: Replay
rpcs.description: Replay re-publishes events from a stream within a time range.

rpcs.name: ListStreams
rpcs.description: ListStreams returns all active NATS JetStream streams.

rpcs.name: GetStreamInfo
rpcs.description: GetStreamInfo returns detailed information for a specific stream.

rpcs.name: GetEventStats
rpcs.description: GetEventStats returns overall event bus statistics.

rpcs.name: ValidateToken
rpcs.description: ValidateToken validates a session token and returns identity info.

rpcs.name: GetTenant
rpcs.description: GetTenant returns tenant details.

rpcs.name: ResolvePermissions
rpcs.description: ResolvePermissions returns effective permissions for a user in a tenant.

rpcs.name: ListTenants
rpcs.description: ListTenants returns all tenants.

rpcs.name: CreateTenant
rpcs.description: CreateTenant creates a new tenant.

rpcs.name: UpdateTenant
rpcs.description: UpdateTenant updates tenant details.

rpcs.name: GetTenantBySlug
rpcs.description: GetTenantBySlug returns a tenant by its unique slug.

rpcs.name: ListEntitlements
rpcs.description: ListEntitlements returns entitlements for a tenant.

rpcs.name: UpdateEntitlement
rpcs.description: UpdateEntitlement updates a tenant entitlement.

rpcs.name: ListDomains
rpcs.description: ListDomains returns domains for a tenant.

rpcs.name: CountTenants
rpcs.description: CountTenants returns the count of tenants with optional status filter.

rpcs.name: Decide
rpcs.description: Decide evaluates a policy decision for an action.

rpcs.name: EvaluateGate
rpcs.description: EvaluateGate checks if an action passes governance gates.

rpcs.name: ListPolicies
rpcs.description: ListPolicies returns all policies for a tenant.

rpcs.name: SimulatePolicy
rpcs.description: SimulatePolicy runs a what-if scenario without recording.

rpcs.name: GetPolicy
rpcs.description: GetPolicy returns a single policy by ID.

rpcs.name: CreatePolicy
rpcs.description: CreatePolicy creates a new policy.

rpcs.name: UpdatePolicy
rpcs.description: UpdatePolicy updates an existing policy.

rpcs.name: DeletePolicy
rpcs.description: DeletePolicy soft-deletes a policy by disabling it.

rpcs.name: CountPolicies
rpcs.description: CountPolicies returns the number of policies for a tenant.

rpcs.name: ListDecisions
rpcs.description: ListDecisions returns recorded policy decisions for a tenant.

rpcs.name: GetDecision
rpcs.description: GetDecision returns a single decision by its token.

rpcs.name: CountDecisions
rpcs.description: CountDecisions returns the number of decisions for a tenant.

rpcs.name: RecordUsage
rpcs.description: RecordUsage records a usage event (tokens, API calls, storage).

rpcs.name: QueryUsage
rpcs.description: QueryUsage returns aggregated usage for a tenant.

rpcs.name: GetBudget
rpcs.description: GetBudget returns the current budget status for a tenant.

rpcs.name: ListBudgets
rpcs.description: ListBudgets returns all tenant budgets.

rpcs.name: GetBudgetByTenant
rpcs.description: GetBudgetByTenant returns budget details for a specific tenant.

rpcs.name: UpdateBudget
rpcs.description: UpdateBudget updates budget limits and alert threshold for a tenant.

rpcs.name: QuerySpendHistory
rpcs.description: QuerySpendHistory returns daily spend aggregation over a date range.

rpcs.name: GetDailyUsage
rpcs.description: GetDailyUsage returns usage breakdown for the current day.

rpcs.name: GetCostByAgent
rpcs.description: GetCostByAgent returns usage aggregated by agent slug.

rpcs.name: GetCostByTool
rpcs.description: GetCostByTool returns usage aggregated by tool name.

rpcs.name: GetTopConsumers
rpcs.description: GetTopConsumers returns top agent+tool pairs by usage.

rpcs.name: Ingest
rpcs.description: Ingest ingests content into the knowledge base.

rpcs.name: Query
rpcs.description: Query performs a semantic search over knowledge chunks.

rpcs.name: ListSources
rpcs.description: ListSources returns all knowledge sources for a tenant.

rpcs.name: GetSource
rpcs.description: GetSource returns a single knowledge source by ID.

rpcs.name: UpdateSource
rpcs.description: UpdateSource updates a knowledge source's config/status.

rpcs.name: DeleteSource
rpcs.description: DeleteSource deletes a source and its chunks.

rpcs.name: ListChunks
rpcs.description: ListChunks returns chunks for a source.

rpcs.name: GetChunk
rpcs.description: GetChunk returns a single chunk by ID.

rpcs.name: CountSources
rpcs.description: CountSources returns the count of sources for a tenant.

rpcs.name: CountChunks
rpcs.description: CountChunks returns the count of chunks for a source or tenant.

rpcs.name: SyncSource
rpcs.description: SyncSource marks a source as synced (updates last_synced_at).

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: optional: count chunks for specific source

fields.name: tenant_id
fields.description: optional: count chunks for entire tenant
